ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., database, API, file) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "data_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the feature data (e.g., normal, skewed) */,
  "importance_score" REAL /* Importance score of the feature (e.g., 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_variables" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the target variable belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the target variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the target variable (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric for the target variable (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the data point belongs to */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target variable the data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES target_variables ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the model is trained on */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model (e.g., learning rate, regularization) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the result belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the result belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset or model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset or model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the share belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the share belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the model */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date the model was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_shares_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_shares_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., access, download, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the deployment belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the deployment belongs to */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the model was deployed */,
  "deployment_type" TEXT /* Type of deployment (e.g., cloud, on-premises) */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., running, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the monitoring entry belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the monitoring entry belongs to */,
  "monitoring_date" TEXT /* Date the monitoring data was collected */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being monitored (e.g., accuracy, latency) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_monitoring_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_monitoring_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
